To better receive different types of data, the recipient will need to subscribe to three different topics, which are respectively used to receive the periodically pushed real-time operation data, the change based pushed rated parameter and system status data, and the real-time pushed alarm information. This facilitates the recipient's classification, processing, and storage of different types of data. Corresponding processing strategies can be formulated according to the characteristics of different data, especially for urgent alarm information, which can be responded to quickly.

Through the above introduction, we believe you have gained a deeper understanding of our MQTT based data pushing service, including its support for alarm information. If you have any questions or need further assistance, please feel free to contact us.
